name: Capcom Play System
description: Capcom's late-1980s arcade hardware platform for side-scrolling action, beat 'em ups, shooters, and early fighting games.

eras.title: Arcade Action Era
eras.description: Early CPS period focused on action games, shooters, and beat 'em ups before Street Fighter II reshaped the platform.

eras.title: Street Fighter II Era
eras.description: Street Fighter II and its revisions turn CPS into one of Capcom's defining arcade platforms.
